summary: Final Cleanup Regression Tests Complete - All routes work correctly after backend refactoring. 55/55 tests passed. Duplicate routes removed from server.py, legacy provider.py deleted, Mom appointment routes added to mom.py.
critical_code_review_comments: Provider Dashboard routes work correctly for both DOULA and MIDWIFE via /api/provider/dashboard
Provider Clients routes work correctly - GET /api/provider/clients for both roles
Provider Appointments routes work correctly - GET/POST /api/provider/appointments
Provider Notes routes work correctly - GET/POST /api/provider/notes
Mom Birth Plan route works - GET /api/birth-plan
Mom Timeline route works - GET /api/timeline
Mom Appointments routes work via /api/mom/appointments (new routes in mom.py)
Care Plans routes all work - wellness checkins/entries/stats, postpartum/plan, share-requests
Midwife modular routes work via /api/midwife/* - profile, dashboard, clients, notes
Doula modular routes work via /api/doula/* - profile, dashboard, clients, notes, contract-defaults
Contracts routes work via /api/doula/contracts and /api/midwife/contracts
Invoices routes work via /api/doula/invoices and /api/midwife/invoices
Visits routes work via /api/midwife/visits and /api/provider/visits
Health check works - GET /api/health returns healthy status
Role-based access control verified - Mom blocked from provider routes (403), Providers blocked from mom-only routes (403)
Auth routes work - /api/auth/me returns correct user data for all three roles
Messages routes work - /api/messages/conversations for both Mom and providers
Notifications routes work - /api/notifications for both Mom and providers
Subscription routes work - /api/subscription/status returns subscription info
Marketplace routes work - /api/marketplace/providers returns provider listings
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - read-only verification tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final cleanup verified. All routes work correctly after: (1) Removing duplicate routes from server.py (~1012 lines removed), (2) Deleting legacy provider.py, (3) Adding Mom appointment routes to mom.py. The modular architecture is now fully in place with routes split across: provider_unified.py (shared provider routes), care_plans.py (birth plan, wellness, postpartum, timeline, sharing), mom.py, doula.py, midwife.py, contracts.py, invoices.py, visits.py, etc.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/auth/me - Returns correct user for all roles

changes_verified: Duplicate routes removed from server.py - routes now served via modular routers
Legacy provider.py deleted - functionality migrated to provider_unified.py, doula.py, midwife.py
Mom appointment routes (GET/PUT/DELETE) added to routes/mom.py
server.py reduced to ~2085 lines with only utility routes remaining
